meta.description: Per-pixel pressure calibration lookup tables, one 256-entry table per pixel.
meta.how_to_use: Per frame, per pixel: corrected = clamp(round(raw_adc - rest_baseline), 0, 255); pressure_kpa = table[corrected]. rest_baseline = that pixel's median raw ADC taken while the finger is unloaded (tare at startup).
meta.pixel_numbering: deployment (object-side view during a grasp): pixel1-3 top row left to right, then 4-6, 7-9, 10-12; matches the parquet recorder visualization
meta.flags: pressure >= 203 kPa -> outside calibration grade (coarse); >= 341 kPa -> hard clamped
meta.method: per-pixel monotone (isotonic) fit vs reference transducer, baseline-corrected ADC
meta.zero_pin: table[0] is pinned to 0.0 kPa: corrected ADC 0 means the pixel is at its rest baseline (untouched)
